author: y4rr
content: [action] Phase 11 dispatch: Swin-T shifted-window attention. New ShiftedWindowAttention<T> struct in vision/src/models/swin.rs. relative_position_bias_table as Parameter, relative_position_index as Vec<i64> NOT Parameter. roll-based cyclic shift, view/permute/contiguous window partition. Last stage shift_size=0 exception. Probe-before-fix on named_parameters. STOP-AND-REPORT if roll lacks backward / 8th divergence.
